core_mechanism: a one-parameter deformation of the exponential-logarithm inverse-function pair, fixed by prescribed functional-equation axioms, that replaces the ordinary exp/log and yields an associated conjugate ('deduced') inverse plus a generalized (deformed) additive/composition law
brief_reason: The abstract sets criteria that kappa-deformed logarithm/exponential functions must satisfy and derives from each such pair a 'deduced logarithmic function', a deformed inverse-function construction used to reformulate the generalized theory.
